parameters.command:
=set -euo pipefail

OUT="/data/shared/{{$execution.id}}-tf-validate"
CACHE="/data/shared/tf-cache/plugin-cache"
LOG="$OUT/terraform-log.log"

mkdir -p "$OUT" "$CACHE"
export TF_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR="$CACHE"

cat > "$OUT/main.tf" <<'TF'
{{ $json.query }}
TF

cd "$OUT"
{
  echo "=== terraform fmt ==="
  terraform fmt -recursive -no-color || true
  echo "=== terraform init ==="
  terraform init -input=false -backend=false -no-color || true
  echo "=== terraform validate ==="
  terraform validate -no-color || true
} > "$LOG" 2>&1
cat "$LOG" >&2
